apps.description: Password manager desktop application. Essential for managing all my passwords securely.

apps.description: Code editor. Fast and modern, perfect for quick edits and collaborative coding.

apps.description: Productivity companion that helps you stay focused and organized.

apps.name: Raycast

apps.name: MiddleClick-Sonoma

apps.name: Windows 11
apps.description: Hardened and debloated using ChrisTitus winutil. Optimized for privacy and performance.

apps.name: SyMenu
apps.description: Portable tool collection.

apps.description: Stock browser on iOS.

apps.name: Showly
